dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8732 IH: Pensions for Retired Uniformed Servicemembers Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Raskin (for himself, Mr. Bacon, and Ms. Dexter) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Armed Services

form.official-title: To amend title 10, United States Code, the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration Commissioned Officer Corps Act of 2002, and the Public Health Service Act, to pay retired pay from the Department of Defense Military Retirement Fund to retired members of the commissioned corps of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration and of the Public Health Service, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Pensions for Retired Uniformed Servicemembers Act.

section.header: Department of Defense Military Retirement Fund: payment of retired pay for all members of the uniformed services

subsection.text: Section 1463 of title 10, United States Code, is amended—

paragraph.text: in paragraph (1), by striking retired lists and all that follows through Space Force and inserting retired lists of the uniformed services;
in paragraph (2), by striking armed forces and inserting uniformed services; and

subparagraph.text: by striking Department of Defense and the Department of Homeland Security and inserting Departments of Defense, Homeland Security, Commerce, and Health and Human Services;
by striking armed forces and inserting uniformed services;
by striking and section and inserting section; and

by inserting , subtitle C of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration Commissioned Officer Corps Act of 2002 (33 U.S.C. 3041 et seq.), and section 229 of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 429) after Public Law 96–402.

paragraph.text: Section 1461 of such title is amended—

subparagraph.text: in subsection (a), by striking the Department of Defense and the Coast Guard and inserting the uniformed services; and
in subsection (b)—

subclause.text: by striking armed forces and inserting uniformed services; and
by striking ; and and inserting a semicolon;

clause.text: in paragraph (3), by striking the period at the end and inserting a semicolon; and
by adding at the end the following new paragraphs:

paragraph.text: a program under subtitle C of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration Commissioned Officer Corps Act of 2002 (33 U.S.C. 3041 et seq.); and
a program under section 211 or 221 of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 212, 213a).

paragraph.header: Determination of contributions to the Fund
paragraph.text: Section 1465 of such title is amended—

subparagraph.text: in subsection (a), by adding at the end the following new paragraph:

paragraph.text: Not later than January 1, 2027, the Board of Actuaries, in consultation with the Secretaries of the departments specified in section 1463(a)(4) of this title, shall determine the amount that is the value on the date of such determination of future benefits payable from the Fund that are attributable to service in the commissioned corps of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration and of the Public Health Service performed before such date. That amount is the original National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration and Public Health Service unfunded liability of the Fund. The Board shall determine the period of time over which the original National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration and Public Health Service unfunded liability should be liquidated and shall determine an amortization schedule for the liquidation of such liability over that period. Contributions to the Fund for the liquidation of the original National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration and Public Health Service unfunded liability in accordance with such schedule shall be made as provided in section 1466(b) of this title.

subparagraph.text: in subsection (b)—

item.text: by striking Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating and inserting Secretaries of the departments specified in section 1463(a)(4) of this title; and
by striking Department of Defense and Coast Guard and inserting uniformed services;

subclause.text: in subparagraph (A)(ii), by striking Armed Forces and inserting uniformed services; and
in subparagraph (B)(ii), by striking armed forces and inserting uniformed services;

clause.text: in paragraph (2), by inserting , the Department of Health and Human Services Retirement Pay account for Commissioned officers, and the Department of Commerce NOAA Corps Retirement Pay account for Commissioned officers after Coast Guard Retired Pay account; and
in paragraph (3), by striking Department of Defense and Coast Guard;

subparagraph.text: in subsection (c)—

subclause.text: in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating and inserting Secretaries of the departments specified in section 1463(a)(4) of this title;
in subparagraph (A), by striking Armed Forces and inserting uniformed services; and
in subparagraph (B), by striking armed forces and inserting uniformed services; and

clause.text: in paragraphs (2) and (3), by striking Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating both places it appears and inserting Secretaries of the departments specified in section 1463(a)(4) of this title; and

subparagraph.text: in subsection (e), by striking The Secretary of Defense and, with regard to the Coast Guard, the Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating shall and inserting The Secretary of a department specified in section 1463(a)(4) of this title shall, with regard to the respective department.

paragraph.text: Section 1466 of such title is amended—

subparagraph.text: in subsection (a)—

subclause.text: by striking Secretary of Defense and the Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating, with respect to the Coast Guard and inserting Secretaries of the departments specified in section 1463(a)(4) of this title; and
by striking the Secretary of Defense and the Secretary of the department in which the Coast Guard is operating and inserting such Secretaries;

clause.text: in paragraph (1)(B), by inserting , the commissioned corps of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, or the Commissioned Corps of the Public Health Service after Coast Guard; and
in paragraph (2)(B), by striking armed forces and inserting uniformed services;

subparagraph.text: in subsection (b)—

clause.text: in paragraph (1), by striking armed forces under the jurisdiction of the Secretary of a military department and inserting uniformed services; and

in paragraph (2), by striking Coast Guard and inserting Coast Guard, commissioned corps of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, or the Commissioned Corps of the Public Health Service; and

subparagraph.text: in subsection (c)—

clause.text: in paragraph (1), by striking Secretary of Defense and inserting Secretaries of the departments specified in section 1463(a)(4) of this title of this title;
in paragraph (2)(A), by striking the Department of Defense and the Coast Guard and inserting each uniformed service; and

in paragraph (3), by striking Secretary of Defense and the Secretary of the Department in which the Coast Guard is operating and inserting Secretaries of the departments specified in section 1463(a)(4) of this title.

paragraph.text: Subchapter I of chapter 73 of title 10, United States Code, is amended—

subparagraph.text: in section 1444(a), by striking armed forces, the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, and the Public Health Service and inserting uniformed services;
by striking armed forces each place it appears and inserting uniformed services;
by striking an armed force both places it appears and inserting a uniformed service;
by striking armed force each place it appears and inserting uniformed service; and
in the headings to sections 1431 and 1432 by striking armed forces both places it appears and inserting uniformed services.

paragraph.text: Section 1449(a) of title 10, United States Code, is amended by striking armed force and inserting uniformed service.

paragraph.header: National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration Commissioned Officer Corps Act of 2002
paragraph.text: Section 261(a) of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration Commissioned Officer Corps Act of 2002 (Public Law 107–372; 33 U.S.C. 3071) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by redesignating paragraphs (21) through (27) as paragraphs (22) through (28), respectively; and
by inserting, after paragraph (20), the following new paragraph (21):

paragraph.text: Chapter 74, relating to the Department of Defense Military Retirement Fund.
Section 221(a) of the Public Health Service Act (42 U.S.C. 213a(a)) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by redesignating paragraphs (6) through (21) as paragraphs (7) through (22), respectively; and
by inserting, after paragraph (5), the following new paragraph (6):

paragraph.text: Chapter 74, Department of Defense Military Retirement Fund.
